# Jungle Pickleball

> Jungle Pickleball is an indoor pickleball club in Ojochal, Costa Rica (the Southern Zone / Costa Ballena), serving Ojochal, Uvita, and Dominical. Four covered courts, open play for all skill levels, a pro shop, cold plunge recovery, and a social lounge. Play rain or shine.

## Key facts
- Location: Calle Tucan, Ojochal, Puntarenas, Costa Rica (9.0841707, -83.6431412)
- Contact: WhatsApp +506 8989 3111 (ask for Roger)
- Hours: open daily, 7:00 AM to 7:30 PM
- Opened: May 2023
- Courts: 4 indoor, covered, pro hard surface
- Amenities: free fiber WiFi, equipment rental and pro shop (official Honolulu Pickleball Company dealer), cold plunge recovery, social lounge with food and drinks, practice dink wall, on-site massage therapy by Samy
- Pricing: visitor drop-in $15 per 90 minute session ($12.50 each for multiple sessions); memberships from $75 per month
- Open play: Tuesday and Thursday at 10:00 AM; Wednesday and Sunday at 8:30 AM; Friday Women's Open at 8:30 AM; alternating sessions Monday and Saturday (message to confirm)
- Beginners welcome: all skill levels, free paddles and balls, no partner needed
- Reviews: rated 4.8 out of 5 on Google across 24 reviews. Visitors highlight the welcoming owners (Roger and his wife), clean covered courts, helpful staff, and the friendly community.

## Upcoming events
- Marlapalooza 2026, Tuesday July 28, 2026 (11:00 AM to 3:00 PM): a community day of pickleball, cornhole, food, and puppies at Jungle Pickleball. Bring an appetizer to share and your own drinks; hotdogs and beverages available for purchase. In place of gifts, guests are asked to consider donating to Shauna's animal rescue efforts. Adoptable puppies will be on site.

## Services
- On-site massage therapy by Samy at Jungle Pickleball for relaxation and muscle recovery. Book on WhatsApp +506 8989 3111.
